Describe the key preparation steps shown in the video sequence.
canonical_answer: At 8s, a person stirs butter and peanut butter in a small bowl; at 10s, the paste is scraped into a large pot containing butter; at 12s, a wooden spoon stirs the creamy substance inside the metal pot; at 16s, white marshmallows are dropped into the brown liquid mixture.
